action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. Iterations 10-13 had very short runtimes (0-12 sec), suggesting DINOv2 training never actually ran. I have ~3.4 hours remaining. Analysis: The most impactful improvement is training DINOv2 and ensembling with CLIP - diverse model architectures (self-supervised vs vision-language) should improve OOD generalization. I need to: (1) Save DINOv2 locally for offline eval, (2) Train DINOv2 with SWAD, (3) Update predict.py for proper ensemble with offline loading. Decision: Write complete training pipeline for DINOv2, train for 20 epochs with SWAD, then submit eval with ensemble.
